C1.note: PDB 1L2Y model 1 fetched/cleaned, propka3 run (no non-standard protonation), tLEaP build PASS (Errors=0, 2788 residues, charge_check 'Total unperturbed charge: 1.0' neutralized with 1 Cl-), ~10k atoms (2787 TIP3P), density equilibrated to 0.994 g/cc. system/system.prmtop + inpcrd present; no residues dropped (PROCESS_REPORT job 38455, STUDY_REPORT §2).

C2.note: Full tier protocol in PLAN.md: ff14SB/TIP3P/Joung-Cheatham each justified via Tier1 lit (PMID 41139839) + Tier2 Amber24 manual pages (§3.1 p.34, §3.6 p.52-53) + manual-validation of leaprc names; ff19SB+OPC explicitly considered and rejected for over-stabilization of marginal-stability miniprotein. NVT for H-REMD justified (Amber24 §25.3, ntp=0). PLAN 'APPROVED 2026-06-09' gate present. No hardcoded defaults.

C3.note: min1/min2/heat(300.7K)/density(0.994 g/cc)/equil2(299.5K) all PASS. REST2 v2 production completed: v2.000.out shows 'Master Total wall time 4.12 hours' completion marker, 8 trajectories each 2.5 GB, rem.log = 960000 exchange records (120000 exch x 8 rep = full 60 ns/replica). No blow-up/NaN; lambda1 trace stable folded with reversible excursions. v1 silent-fail (velocity-less cpptraj restarts) diagnosed and fixed.

C4.note: Correct REST2 observables for folding question: backbone RMSD-to-native time series at physical replica (independently verified: 517 frames >4A, folded 96.9%), Rg, DSSP helix, Asp9-Arg16 salt bridge, per-rung folded fraction (hot rung 59% folded confirmed), and exchange acceptance read from rem.log. I independently recomputed overall acceptance = 22.7% (T=218022/F=741978) matching the report exactly.

C5.note: Answer key (orig 089): REST2 shows folding/unfolding events at physical replica + acceptance 20-50%. Source paper Wang/Friesner/Berne 2011 (PMID 21714551, get_abstract) confirms REST2 demonstrated as proof-of-concept on Trp-cage folding in explicit water. Agent observed reversible folding<->unfolding at lambda=1 (RMSD up to 8.37A, 126 excursions, refolding to native) and acceptance 22.7% (independently verified, within 20-50%). Both halves of expected outcome met. Minor: report cites DOI 10.1021/jp204430w for the 2011 paper; correct DOI is 10.1021/jp204407d (citation typo only, PMID/authors/year correct).
